description: Source inventory has exactly 32 records covering all referenced PDF filenames from PDF-001 through PDF-032.
expected_outcome: Source inventory CSV has exactly 32 rows with non-empty filename, coverage status, and hash columns.
sabotage_variant: Add a 33rd row with a non-existent filename PDF-033 and verify validation fails.

description: Source hashes are non-empty and correctly formatted as either a SHA-256 hex string or the literal 'placeholder'.
expected_outcome: Every row in the source inventory has a hash field that is either a 64-char hex string or the string 'placeholder'.
sabotage_variant: Set one hash to an empty string and verify validation fails.

description: Per-PDF coverage exists for all 32 PDFs across the coverage CSV files.
expected_outcome: For each PDF-001 through PDF-032, at least one coverage CSV file has a row with that PDF filename.
sabotage_variant: Remove the coverage row for PDF-015 and verify validation fails.

description: Generic pattern map correctly separates BenchCore-specific terms from Agent_X-generic patterns.
expected_outcome: Pattern map JSON has a 'benchcore_specific' key and a 'agent_x_generic' key; no term appears in both lists.
sabotage_variant: Move TranX into the agent_x_generic list and verify validation fails.

description: No requirement in the benchmark pack lacks source, artifact, or test traceability.
expected_outcome: Every requirement in requirements/ has non-empty source_ids, artifact_path, and test_id fields.
sabotage_variant: Introduce a requirement with an empty source_ids array and verify validation fails.

description: Abduction rules reject paraphrase labeling according to RULE-009 validation test.
expected_outcome: When a candidate test is labeled 'abduction' but its content is a verbatim paraphrase of source text, validation returns false.
sabotage_variant: Remove the forbidden_when check for paraphrases and verify the test fails.

description: Product-specific boundary report prevents Agent_X core leakage of BenchCore-specific terms.
expected_outcome: No BenchCore-specific term (TranX, MOS, OverDrive, WSL) appears in the Agent_X core ontology files.
sabotage_variant: Add 'TranX' to the core ontology terms list and verify validation fails.

description: Visual inventory covers all requirement-bearing visuals referenced in documentation.
expected_outcome: Every visual reference (figure number, screenshot filename) in BENCHCORE-DOC-008 has a corresponding row in the visual inventory CSV.
sabotage_variant: Drop the row for Figure 3 from the visual inventory and verify validation fails.

description: All source ID cross-references point to existing sections in their target documents.
expected_outcome: For each cross-reference in the corpus, the target document section exists and has matching content.
sabotage_variant: Change a cross-reference to point to a non-existent section and verify validation fails.

description: Placeholder hashes are documented as such and do not appear in integrity validation checks.
expected_outcome: Integrity validation script skips rows where hash is 'placeholder' and only validates rows with real SHA-256 hashes.
sabotage_variant: Replace a real hash with 'placeholder' and verify that integrity check still passes (i.e. placeholders are tolerated).
